Description: Opens the start confirmation screen before a real run begins and shows the previous Right Left and Selection attempt results.
Opens route mode start direction and turn-wait setup.
Opens shared thresholds and top-level tuning menus.
Opens event-test selection and per-test configuration.
Shows live onboard IMU values and status.
Shows relative yaw and lets the user renew the yaw reference.
Runs the same recognition and handling flow as Start without driving the motors and shows live IR plus ultrasonic data.
Shows live IR states and shared event-confirmation values.
Shows live ultrasonic distances.
Selects how branch choices are made across attempts. Sequence runs Right then Left then preselects the better branch using dead-end status and run time.
Sets the initial heading for a real run.
